items.title: At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA Advances Graphics and Simulation With Agentic and Physical AI
items.content_text: From open models to real-time simulation, AI and graphics breakthroughs are transforming media, content creation and robotics.

items.title: Microsoft expands Azure AI and HPC infrastructure with AMD - The Official Microsoft Blog
items.content_text: AI workloads are scaling faster than any single infrastructure approach can support — with more models, new agent-driven workloads and surging compute demand driving the need for greater specialization across the stack. To meet this need, Microsoft continues to evolve Azure’s infrastructure, including expanding its AI fleet with AMD’s most advanced AI and high-performance computing...

items.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Building Life Science Industry’s Most Advanced AI Factory on NVIDIA Vera Rubin
items.content_text: The pharmaceutical company has demonstrated how AI can transform how drugs discovery and is now scaling AI across R&D to accelerate the discovery of next-generation medicines.

items.title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Maximizes Intelligence per Dollar for Post-Training Workloads — a Key Metric for Agentic AI
items.content_text: Lowest cost per token from extreme codesign maximizes intelligence per dollar for post-training in the agentic era.

items.title: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs approach to bioresilience
items.content_text: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs approach to bioresilience, using AI models to support prevention, detection and response.

items.title: NVIDIA Introduces New Jetson Thor Computers to Advance Mainstream Robotics and Edge AI
items.content_text: New NVIDIA Blackwell-powered T3000 and T2000 modules, paired with new NVIDIA Jetson software memory optimization and agent skills, help partners and customers move advanced robotics, visual AI and edge workloads onto compact, power-efficient systems.

items.title: AI in Indian Education: Atal Innovation Mission and Google launch ATL Saathi
items.content_text: Atal Innovation Mission launches ATL Saathi, a Gemini powered AI assistant empowering India's educators to nurture the next generation of innovators.

items.title: The latest in our company transformation - The Official Microsoft Blog
items.content_text: Amy Coleman, EVP and Chief People Officer, shared the following communication with employees today. When I stepped into this role, I promised to communicate more openly with you and share the “why” behind our decisions. Today we are eliminating around 4,800 roles, about 2.1% of our global workforce, as we focus our people, investments, and...

items.title: Microsoft Frontier Company: AI engineering that amplifies and protects your intelligence - The Official Microsoft Blog
items.content_text: The pace of AI adoption is moving incredibly fast. Customers have moved well beyond experimentation and understand the importance of adopting AI to transform their business. They are now concentrating on delivering measurable business outcomes and demonstrating a return on their AI investments, while ensuring their intelligence is amplified and their IP is protected. Today...

items.title: Securing internal systems against increasingly capable and imperfectly aligned AI
items.content_text: Discover our AI Control Roadmap: a defense-in-depth system to securely manage advanced, potentially misaligned AI agents.

items.title: Unlocking UK house-building with AI-accelerated planning
items.content_text: Google DeepMind is working alongside the UK government to co-develop an AI-powered prototype to help cut application decision times by 50%.

items.title: Google DeepMind and partners announce multi-agent safety research funding call.
items.content_text: Google DeepMind and partners are announcing a new technical research funding call of up to $10M for researchers worldwide to strengthen multi-agent safety.

items.title: Gemini’s guided learning: results from a randomized controlled trial in Sierra Leone
items.content_text: Google DeepMind shares results from a randomized controlled trial in Sierra Leone, measuring the impact of AI in education on student learning and engagement.

items.title: Prime for Young Adults introduces 5% cash back on dorm and apartment essentials, just in time for move-in
items.content_text: From today through September 15, Prime for Young Adults members can earn 5% cash back on home, kitchen, and office purchases—on top of existing categories like beauty, apparel, and electronics.

items.title: How to watch the 'Masters of the Universe' movie, streaming on Prime Video starting July 22
items.content_text: The live-action film adaptation of the classic 1980s toy brand stars Nicholas Galitzine as Prince Adam/He-Man.

items.title: What you need to know about Amazon today: July 21, 2026
items.content_text: Here are the latest headlines from Amazon News.

items.title: SIMA 2: A Gemini-Powered AI Agent for 3D Virtual Worlds
items.content_text: Introducing SIMA 2, the next milestone in our research creating general and helpful AI agents. By integrating the advanced capabilities of our Gemini models, SIMA is evolving from an instruction-follower into an interactive gaming companion.

items.title: Amazon’s commitment to low prices every day
items.content_text: Amazon offers the lowest prices every day across the widest selection of products—plus extra savings for Prime members.

items.title: AlphaEarth Foundations helps map our planet in unprecedented detail
items.content_text: New AI model integrates petabytes of Earth observation data to generate a unified data representation that revolutionizes global mapping and monitoring

items.title: AlphaEvolve: A Gemini-powered coding agent for designing advanced algorithms
items.content_text: New AI agent evolves algorithms for math and practical applications in computing by combining the creativity of large language models with automated evaluators

items.title: How to watch the WNBA on Prime Video
items.content_text: Prime Video will stream 30 WNBA regular-season games, featuring stars like Caitlin Clark, A'ja Wilson, and 2026 No. 1 pick Azzi Fudd.

items.title: Everything you need to know about Amazon Business and how it helps 11 million organizations save time and money
items.content_text: Amazon Business drives over $60 billion in annualized gross sales, helping more than 11 million organizations worldwide simplify business buying. Here's what it is and how it works.

items.title: NVIDIA Agent Toolkit Expands With New Omniverse Libraries, Putting AI Agents to Work Building Simulation-Ready Worlds
items.content_text: NVIDIA today announced that NVIDIA Agent Toolkit now includes NVIDIA Omniverse™ libraries — a collection of software components that give AI agents tools and skills to add physical AI capabilities to existing applications and prepare 3D content for simulation.

items.title: Japan Government, Industrial Leaders and NVIDIA Launch the World’s First National AI Infrastructure
items.content_text: NVIDIA today announced it is working with Noetra Corp. to launch an NVIDIA Vera Rubin AI factory with 13,750 NVIDIA Vera CPUs and 27,500 NVIDIA Rubin GPUs for national physical AI.

items.title: Japan’s Robotics and Manufacturing Leaders Build on NVIDIA Cosmos to Advance Physical AI Frontier
items.content_text: NVIDIA today announced that Japan’s physical AI leaders are building on the NVIDIA Cosmos™, NVIDIA Isaac™, NVIDIA Metropolis and NVIDIA Jetson™ platforms to accelerate the deployment of intelligent machines across manufacturing, mobility, infrastructure and robotics.

items.title: Japan’s Enterprises and Startups Build Industry-Specialized AI With NVIDIA Nemotron Open Models
items.content_text: NVIDIA today announced that leading Japanese enterprises, startups and research institutions are building industry-specialized AI models and applications with NVIDIA Nemotron™ open models, data and libraries, accelerating the development of AI tailored to Japan’s language, industries and workforce.
